mapper.sql: tpa.employee_id, tpa.plan_id, tpa.service_year, tpa.begin_date, tpa.end_date, tpa.enabled_flag, tpa.id, tpa.create_time, tpa.create_by, tpa.update_time, tpa.update_by

${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_employee_id, ${tAlias}.plan_id as ${tAlias}_plan_id, ${tAlias}.service_year as ${tAlias}_service_year, ${tAlias}.begin_date as ${tAlias}_begin_date, ${tAlias}.end_date as ${tAlias}_end_date, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into td_plan_agreement (employee_id, plan_id, service_year, begin_date, end_date, enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, check_method) values (#{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{planId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{serviceYear,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{beginDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{endDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{checkMethod, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
